title: HermitCrafted
description: A compilation of all mods seen in Hermitcraft Season 10.
body:
After watching and enjoying the Hermitcraft content and seeing the introduction of client mods that most used, I wanted to make a modpack for it! Although the modlist has been public on the Hermitcraft Reddit, I figured I'd share my version of what the Hermits currently have, what I feel should be added, and share it to the public! Mods such as Better Clouds, popularly seen in BdoubleO's videos. Armor Poser, used for the armorstand magic. And so much more!

For 1.21+, the original maintainer of Litematica, MiniHUD, Tweakeroo, and ItemScroller is no longer maintaining the mods as of right now. Instead, check out the trusted user who has been maintaining the popular mods for the newer versions.

- [Litematica](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/litematica)
- [Tweakeroo](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/tweakeroo)[MiniHUD](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/minihud)
- [ItemScroller](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/itemscroller)
- [MaLiLib](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/malilib)
